reviews.comment:
Lo mejor de la ruta 14. Su entrada esta escondida la tapa la axion .los muchachos re atentos los baños impecables

(Translated by Google)
The best thing about Route 14. Its entrance is hidden by the Axion gas station. The guys are really attentive, and the bathrooms are spotless.

reviews.comment:
Cuidado gente !!! Tengo un fiat Siena con un tanque de 45 lts pare a llenar con medio tanque en esa estación y me cobraron 30 lts de combustible... Evidentemente me robaron cerca de 8 lts. A PRESTAR ATENCIÓN !!!!

(Translated by Google)
Beware, everyone! I have a Fiat Siena with a 45-liter tank. I stopped to fill up at that station when it was half full, and they charged me for 30 liters of fuel... They obviously stole about 8 liters from me. PAY ATTENTION!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWeFMyWnlNamh5TVdKeGNEVXROM2czT1Rsb2RuYxAB
